rationale: Educ. Code §33.085 governs UIL authority over sports officials and is wholly unrelated to property tax homestead exemptions under Tax Code §11.13(b). No conflict exists.
quote: Sec. 33.085. AUTHORITY OF UNIVERSITY INTERSCHOLASTIC LEAGUE REGARDING ACTIVITIES INVOLVING SPORTS OFFICIALS.
_note: Rule text pertains to UIL sports officials; proposed change concerns property tax homestead exemption. No overlap.
